problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
hypothesis: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Mitochondrial. Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
